# SRNet: A 3D Scene Recognition Network using Static Graph and Dense Semantic Fusion

- **Work ID:** `LPR-083`
- **Reviewed version:** `doi:10.1111/cgf.14146`
- **Year / venue:** 2020 / Computer Graphics Forum
- **Relevance:** `core_lpr`
- **Representative tier:** `ordinary`
- **Links:** [Paper](https://doi.org/10.1111/cgf.14146)

## Reviewed taxonomy assignments

- [global_descriptor](../branches/global_descriptor.md)
- [global_descriptor/learning](../branches/global_descriptor--learning.md)
- [global_descriptor/learning/point](../branches/global_descriptor--learning--point.md)
- [semantics](../branches/semantics.md)
- [semantics/graph_based](../branches/semantics--graph_based.md)

## Accepted structured facts

- **datasets:** Oxford, University Sector (U.S.), Residential Area (R.A.), Business District (B.D.), ModelNet40 (cross-task generalization only) — `source_fact`; manual, p. 6–9, § 4.1 Dataset;4.7 Generalization, Table 1-6;Fig. 5-7
- **input_unit:** single ground-removed point-cloud submap downsampled to 4096 points — `source_fact`; manual, p. 3–6, § 3.1 Overview;4.1 Dataset, Fig. 3
- **invariances:** point-order permutation — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 3–7, § 2.1 Point Cloud Reasoning Methods;3.1 Overview;3.2 Static Graph Convolution;4. Experiment, Fig. 3;Eq. 2-3
- **representation:** static Cartesian-coordinate KNN graph, 6 SGC layers, three SAM-weighted late layers, Dense Semantic Fusion with duplicate connections, shared SLP, NetVLAD, 256-D global descriptor, Euclidean-distance KNN retrieval — `source_fact`; manual, p. 4–6, § 3.1 Overview;3.2 Static Graph Convolution;3.3 Spatial Attention Module;3.4 Dense Semantic Fusion, Fig. 3-4;Eq. 1-7
- **uses_learning:** yes — `source_fact`; manual, p. 1–7, § Abstract;3. Methods;4.2 Implementation Details, Fig. 3
- **uses_sequence:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 1–4, § Abstract;1. Introduction;3.1 Overview, Fig. 1;Eq. 1

> Information types distinguish author-reported facts, derived facts, researcher judgements, and agent inferences. The locator identifies the reviewed source; verbatim evidence remains in the private audit store.
